products.name: Elegant Leather Handbag
products.description: Crafted from premium genuine leather, this elegant handbag features a spacious interior with multiple compartments, gold-tone hardware, and a detachable shoulder strap. Perfect for both office and evening occasions.

products.name: Classic Leather Wallet
products.description: A timeless bi-fold wallet made from full-grain leather. Features 8 card slots, 2 bill compartments, and a coin pocket. The perfect everyday companion.

products.name: Designer Crossbody Bag
products.description: A chic crossbody bag with adjustable strap and multiple pockets. Made from high-quality vegan leather with elegant gold-tone hardware.

products.name: Structured Tote Bag
products.description: A spacious structured tote bag perfect for work and weekend use. Features a magnetic snap closure, interior zip pocket, and sturdy handles. Fits a 15-inch laptop with ease.

products.name: Suede Bucket Bag
products.description: A trendy bucket bag crafted from soft premium suede. Drawstring closure, detachable pouch inside, and an adjustable crossbody strap. Available in deep caramel.

products.name: Evening Clutch Bag
products.description: A glamorous evening clutch adorned with delicate embroidery and a gold chain strap. Compact yet fitting — holds your essentials for any special occasion.

products.name: Quilted Shoulder Bag
products.description: A sophisticated quilted shoulder bag inspired by timeless luxury design. Features a gold chain-link strap, flap closure with CC-inspired clasp, and a fully lined interior.

products.name: Mini Satchel Bag
products.description: A cute and compact mini satchel with top handle and crossbody strap. Perfect for outings when you need just the essentials. Smooth pebbled leather exterior.

products.name: Slim Card Holder Wallet
products.description: An ultra-slim card holder crafted from genuine leather. Holds up to 6 cards with an easy-access slot. Minimalist design that fits neatly in any pocket.

products.name: Ladies Zip-Around Wallet
products.description: A full-size zip-around wallet with 12 card slots, dual bill compartments, coin zip pocket, and phone sleeve. Elegant floral embossed leather exterior.

products.name: Backpack Leather Rucksack
products.description: A premium leather backpack blending style and function. Padded laptop sleeve, multiple compartments, antique brass zippers, and comfortable adjustable straps.

products.name: Men's Bifold Dress Wallet
products.description: A sleek bifold wallet for the modern gentleman. Made from smooth genuine leather with RFID blocking lining. Slim profile with 6 card slots and 2 note sections.

products.name: Midnight Oud Perfume
products.description: An enchanting blend of rare oud wood, amber, and exotic spices. This long-lasting Eau de Parfum creates an aura of mystery and sophistication that lingers throughout the day.

products.name: Rose Garden Eau de Parfum
products.description: A delicate bouquet of fresh roses, jasmine, and peony. This feminine fragrance captures the essence of a blooming garden in springtime.

products.name: Midnight Musk Cologne
products.description: A bold and masculine fragrance combining musk, sandalwood, and citrus notes. Perfect for the modern gentleman who appreciates timeless elegance.

products.name: Arabian Nights Oud Spray
products.description: Inspired by the souks of the Middle East, this luxurious oud spray weaves together rose, saffron, and dark oud. A statement fragrance for those who dare to be different.

products.name: Lavender Bloom Eau de Toilette
products.description: A calming and refreshing fragrance built around French lavender, light musk, and clean white woods. Ideal for daytime wear and office use.

products.name: Citrus Burst Cologne
products.description: An energising citrus explosion of bergamot, lemon zest, and grapefruit, anchored by a warm vetiver base. The ultimate summer fragrance for active lifestyles.

products.name: Amber Velvet EDP
products.description: A rich and warm amber fragrance layered with vanilla, caramel, and patchouli. Seductive and long-lasting — perfect for evenings and special occasions.

products.name: White Musk Perfume Oil
products.description: A pure and sensual white musk perfume oil that blends seamlessly with your skin chemistry. Alcohol-free, long-lasting, and suitable for daily use.

products.name: Ocean Breeze Eau Fraiche
products.description: Fresh oceanic notes of sea salt, driftwood, and aquatic florals create a crisp, clean fragrance that evokes a cool sea breeze. Light and perfect for warm weather.

products.name: Sandalwood Royale EDP
products.description: Deep and creamy Indian sandalwood blended with cardamom, rose, and a hint of oud. A timeless Oriental fragrance with exceptional longevity.

products.name: Vanilla Rouge Parfum
products.description: An irresistible blend of Madagascar vanilla, warm spices, and red berries. Sweet yet sophisticated — a crowd favourite for all seasons.

products.name: Black Orchid Intense EDP
products.description: A seductive and dark fragrance inspired by rare black orchid. Black truffle, ylang-ylang, and dark chocolate weave together for an unforgettably rich scent.

products.name: Chronograph Classic Watch
products.description: A sophisticated timepiece featuring a stainless steel case, genuine leather strap, and precise quartz movement. Water-resistant up to 50 meters with date display.

products.name: Minimalist Rose Gold Watch
products.description: Elegant simplicity meets modern design. This minimalist watch features a rose gold-plated case, mesh strap, and Japanese quartz movement for precise timekeeping.

products.name: Sport Digital Watch
products.description: A rugged sports watch with heart rate monitor, step counter, and water resistance up to 100 meters. Features LED backlight and long-lasting battery.

products.name: Luxury Gold Dress Watch
products.description: A statement dress watch with a gold-plated stainless steel case, sapphire crystal glass, and a rich brown crocodile-embossed leather strap. Swiss quartz movement.

products.name: Ladies Crystal Bracelet Watch
products.description: A stunning ladies watch featuring a crystal-encrusted bezel and a flexible bracelet strap. Slim profile with a silver-white dial and Roman numeral indices.

products.name: Men's Automatic Mechanical Watch
products.description: A prestige automatic watch with visible movement through sapphire caseback. Stainless steel case, exhibition dial, 40-hour power reserve. No battery ever needed.

products.name: Smart Fitness Tracker Band
products.description: Track your health with this sleek fitness band. Features heart rate, SpO2, sleep tracking, 7-day battery, and 50-meter water resistance. Compatible with Android & iOS.

products.name: Couple Watch Gift Set
products.description: A perfectly matched his-and-hers watch set presented in a premium gift box. Identical design in two sizes — a thoughtful gift for anniversaries, weddings, and milestones.

products.name: Diver's Steel Watch
products.description: A professional-style diver watch with a unidirectional rotating bezel, screw-down crown, and 200-meter water resistance. Bold and masculine on a stainless steel bracelet.

products.name: Vintage Leather Strap Watch
products.description: A classic vintage-style watch with a distressed leather strap and aged dial. Evokes the charm of 1950s watchmaking. Perfect for heritage-style dressing.

products.name: Ultra-Thin Dress Watch
products.description: At just 6mm thin, this ultra-slim dress watch is the pinnacle of understated elegance. Clean white dial, stick indices, and a slim leather strap — pure class.

products.name: Pilot Aviator Watch
products.description: Inspired by cockpit instruments, this bold aviator watch features a large 44mm case, oversized crown, luminous hands, and a matte black dial. Adventure awaits.

products.name: Children's Adventure Book Set
products.description: A collection of 5 beautifully illustrated adventure stories that spark imagination and creativity. Perfect for children aged 5-10. Includes moral lessons and interactive activities.

products.name: Organic Baby Care Kit
products.description: A complete care kit with organic baby lotion, shampoo, diaper cream, and powder. Made with natural ingredients, hypoallergenic, and pediatrician-approved.

products.name: Educational Puzzle Collection
products.description: A set of 4 educational puzzles that develop problem-solving skills and hand-eye coordination. Made from eco-friendly materials with vibrant colors.

products.name: Creative Art & Craft Kit
products.description: Everything a young artist needs in one box — watercolours, crayons, coloured pencils, stencils, and an A4 sketch pad. Encourages creativity and fine motor skills in kids aged 4-12.

products.name: Mega Building Blocks Set
products.description: 120 pieces of large, durable interlocking blocks in 6 bright colours. Develops spatial thinking and creativity. Compatible with major building block brands. Ages 2+.

products.name: Kids' School Stationery Set
products.description: A complete back-to-school stationery pack including pencils, eraser, sharpener, ruler, highlighters, and a fun pencil case with a zipper. Perfect for ages 5-14.

products.name: Toddler Soft Toy Bundle
products.description: A bundle of 3 super-soft plush toys — a bunny, bear, and elephant. Made from hypoallergenic materials, safe for babies from 0+. Machine washable.

products.name: Kids' Insulated Water Bottle
products.description: A BPA-free stainless steel water bottle with a fun printed design and a secure flip-top lid. Keeps drinks cold for 12 hours. Fits most school bag pockets. 500ml.

products.name: Alphabet Flashcard Learning Set
products.description: 84 double-sided flashcards covering alphabets, numbers, shapes, and colours. Wipe-clean surface, bold illustrations, and fun facts on each card. Ages 2-6.

products.name: Baby Skincare Essentials Set
products.description: A gentle skincare duo with baby moisturising lotion and a soothing bath wash. Dermatologist tested, tear-free formula. With natural chamomile and aloe vera extracts.

products.name: Kids' Colouring Book Mega Pack
products.description: A set of 4 themed colouring books — animals, vehicles, fairy tales, and mandalas — with 200+ pages total. Comes with 24 premium wax crayons. Ages 3-10.

products.name: Pretend Play Doctor Kit
products.description: A 12-piece role-play doctor set including stethoscope, thermometer, syringe, and more. Sparks imaginative play and teaches kids about healthcare. Ages 3+.

products.name: Velvet Matte Lipstick Set
products.description: A set of 6 richly pigmented matte lipsticks in stunning shades. Long-lasting formula with moisturizing ingredients. Cruelty-free and vegan.

products.name: Hydrating Skincare Collection
products.description: A complete 4-step skincare routine including cleanser, toner, serum, and moisturizer. Infused with hyaluronic acid and vitamin E for radiant, hydrated skin.

products.name: Premium Makeup Brush Set
products.description: A professional 12-piece brush set with soft synthetic bristles and elegant handles. Includes brushes for foundation, eyes, cheeks, and more.

products.name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum
products.description: A potent 20% Vitamin C serum with niacinamide and ferulic acid. Fades dark spots, evens skin tone, and boosts collagen. Clinically tested, dermatologist approved.

products.name: 24-Shade Eyeshadow Palette
products.description: A versatile palette with 24 highly pigmented shades — from neutral nudes to bold smoky tones. Includes matte, shimmer, and glitter finishes. Zero fallout formula.

products.name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Gel
products.description: A lightweight, non-greasy SPF 50 sunscreen gel with broad-spectrum protection. PA+++ rated, suitable for all skin types, and doubles as a primer under makeup.

products.name: Radiance Highlighter Trio
products.description: Three illuminating highlighter shades — champagne, rose gold, and bronze — in one sleek compact. Buildable, blendable, and long-wearing for a lit-from-within glow.

products.name: Gentle Foam Face Wash
products.description: A gentle foaming cleanser that removes dirt, oil, and makeup without stripping natural moisture. With green tea extract and salicylic acid. Suitable for all skin types.

products.name: Blush & Bronzer Duo Palette
products.description: A perfectly curated blush and bronzer palette in one compact. Four flattering shades that work for all skin tones. Silky texture with a natural, sun-kissed finish.

products.name: Volumising Mascara
products.description: A buildable mascara that delivers intense volume, length, and curl in one coat. Smudge-proof and clump-free formula. Ophthalmologist tested, safe for sensitive eyes.

products.name: Retinol Night Repair Cream
products.description: A powerful retinol-based night cream that reduces fine lines, firms skin, and improves texture overnight. With soothing peptides and niacinamide to minimise irritation.

products.name: Nail Polish Collection Set
products.description: A set of 10 chip-resistant nail polishes in seasonal trending shades. Quick-dry formula, gel-like finish, and free from harmful chemicals. Includes a base and top coat.
